libtooltips.configuration.line_before.to: Adds an empty line BEFORE the description, AFTER the [shift]
libtooltips.configuration.line_after.too: Adds an empty line AFTER the description
Which color to use as a base for the tooltip. The value is the color as an integer (use an online color picker)
libtooltips.configuration.title: LibTooltip's Config
tooltip.minecraft.diamond.1: And look, it even supports several lines, wow
tooltip.minecraft.diamond.2: To prevent incompatibilities with other text processor APIs,
tooltip.minecraft.diamond.3: it is recommended tags have a non-generic name such as 'ltrgb' instead of 'rgb'
tooltip.minecraft.diamond.5: Setting a line as 'hide' will stop the rest of the lines from displaying.
tooltip.minecraft.diamond.6: This is useful for translations where different languages might have less lines than the default.
